_comment: Deliberately-broken sample to verify the verify-brief.ts harness catches failures. Contains: banned vocab (moat, bridge metaphor, stand out), invented school not in dbContext, wrong gap branch (library-entry when intake says not_at_all), pre-med reference for a CIS student.
dbContext: University of Toronto (Canada). University of Edinburgh (United Kingdom). McGill (Canada).

plan.pileContrast: Most pre-meds in your year just want to stand out

whereYouStand.headline: Your moat is bigger than you realize
whereYouStand.body: You stand out among the pre-meds applying this year. The bridge between math and humanities is your edge. Build the bridge.

schools.name: Imaginary University of Paris
schools.lore: This school does not exist in the dbContext.
